name: DevOpsDays Baltimore 2025
description: From fledgling startups to established industry, the DMV is home to a large, vibrant technology community. Baltimore, in particular, has been a flurry of activity in the past several years, drawing attention from around the globe.

location.name: Pava Marie LaPere Center for Entrepreneurship
